title: dissanthelium peruvianum
intro: Dissanthelium peruvianum, also known as Peruvian hair grass, is a type of grass native to the Andean region of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dissanthelium peruvianum include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various methods of consumption and application of its medicinal properties.
